shortDescription: Character-filled 3-bedroom detached residence in High Park featuring original details and modern upgrades.
fullDescription: Welcome to 145 Indian Road in the vibrant High Park neighbourhood. This beautifully presented detached home offers generous living space across multiple levels. The main living area impresses with nine-foot ceilings, designer fixtures, and a seamless flow between rooms. The kitchen is a chef’s dream with quartz countertops, a large island, and high-end stainless-steel appliances. The sleeping quarters comprise 3 comfortable bedrooms, the largest enjoying a private ensuite bathroom. Smart-home features, updated plumbing, and a newer roof provide peace of mind for years to come. This coveted pocket puts you within walking distance of top schools, green spaces, and vibrant dining.
keyFeatures: Updated kitchen with quartz counters and soft-close cabinetry
